1: Hear my cry, O God;attend to my prayer.
2: From the ends of the earth I call out to Youwhenever my heart is faint.Lead me to the rockthat is higher than I.
3: For You have been my refuge,a tower of strength against the enemy.
4: Let me dwell in Your tent foreverand take refuge in the shelter of Your wings.Selah
5: For You have heard my vows, O God;You have given me the inheritancereserved for those who fear Your name.
6: Increase the days of the king’s life;may his years span many generations.
7: May he sit enthroned in God’s presence forever;appoint Your loving devotionand Your faithfulness to guard him.
8: Then I will ever sing praise to Your nameand fulfill my vows day by day.
